title: SNP genotyping of indigenous goats of Uganda based on the Goat_IGGC_65K_v2 illumina chip
author: Nantongo, Ziwena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Uganda's indigenous goats are characterised based on ethnic communities that raise them, average mature weight, and hair coat characteristics. Uganda's indigenous goats have  been genotyped based on the Goat_IGGC_65K_v2 illumina chip to study their population structure and genetic characteristics. Information generated from this data is vital for the sustainable utilisation, development, and conservation of Uganda's goat genetic resources.
